creator: will@physics.purdue.edu
text:
On Mon, Jun 11, 2001 at 09:24:23AM -0500, David W. Chapman Jr. (dwcjr@inethouston.net) wrote:
> Yeah, if you go to kmp3.org you get some domain selling page and some 
> "pr0n" links, maybe this port should be erased?

Probably.  The originator's email address has changed since it
was dedrick@dsl-117-e.resnet.purdue.edu, now I believe it's
dedrick@purdue.edu (cc'd).

But I'm sure he won't object to me removing the port since KMP3
is of KDE 1.x vestige.  Too bad the current KDE2 MP3 stuff sucks
on FreeBSD thanks to sucky pthreads support.  :(

Anyway, XMMS does the job just fine.  I'll wait for the
multimedia support in KDE2 to become crossplatform, and just
remove this port for now.

Thanks for closing the PR, Mark.
-- 
wca
